testsuite.name: RESEARCHMANTRA_AUTOMATION.AUTOMATION.Product_Details_And_Live_Trades_Tests

testcase.name: testProductOverviewAndPerformance

testcase.name: testLiveTradesAndFilters
testcase.system-out: -> Navigated to Live Trades Tab. -> Validating Active Trade Card Structure. -> Live Trade screen structure verified instantly.

testsuite.system-out:
⏳ APPIUM IS CLEANING DEVICE AND INSTALLING FRESH APK... ✅ APPIUM SESSION ESTABLISHED - STABILITY MODE ENGAGED!
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testLoginScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Comprehensive Login Suite for: 7632166125 -> No permission popup detected. -> Executing Negative Test: Empty Mobile Number -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid Mobile Number (12345) -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Positive Test: Valid Mobile Number -> Waiting for transition to OTP screen... -> Successfully arrived at OTP Verification Screen. -> Validating OTP Screen UI Elements... -> Change Number and Resend Code buttons are visible. -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid OTP -> Intercepting valid OTP via API... -> Retrieved OTP: 768652 -> Entering Valid OTP... -> Waiting 4 seconds for Dashboard/Registration routing... -> Checking routing destination... -> Existing User detected. -> ✅ Login Flow Complete! Logged in as: Krishna -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testLoginScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 148.884 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testHeaderAndNotifications ======================================================== -> Starting Header & Notifications Verification... -> Step 1: Checking User Profile Name in Header. -> Profile Name verified in header: Krishna -> Step 2: Checking Notification Bell. -> Clicked Notification Bell successfully. -> Returned to Dashboard from Notifications. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testHeaderAndNotifications -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 17.84 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testPerformanceAnalyticsSection ======================================================== -> Starting Performance Analytics Verification... -> Step 1: Scrolling to Performance Section. -> Performance Header and SEBI Disclosure verified. -> Step 2: Testing Analytics Filter Chips. -> Locating Analytics Chip: Nifty Positional -> Clicked Analytics Chip: Nifty Positional -> Performance data verified for Nifty Positional -> Locating Analytics Chip: Midcap Positional -> Clicked Analytics Chip: Midcap Positional -> Performance data verified for Midcap Positional -> Locating Analytics Chip: MCX Positional -> Clicked Analytics Chip: MCX Positional -> Performance data verified for MCX Positional -> Locating Analytics Chip: Long term Goal -> Clicked Analytics Chip: Long term Goal -> Performance data verified for Long term Goal -> Performance Analytics section behaves correctly. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testPerformanceAnalyticsSection -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 27.471 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testDashboardElementsAndNav ======================================================== -> Starting General Content & Navigation Verification... -> Step 1: Checking Core Trade Category Cards. -> Visible: MCX Positional -> Visible: Long term Goal Oriented -> Visible: Nifty Positional -> Visible: Midcap Positional -> Step 2: Checking Explore Promotional Banners. -> Promotional Banners scrolled into view and verified. -> Step 3: Testing Bottom Navigation Functional Clicks. -> Navigated to 'Trades' tab successfully. -> Navigated to 'Blogs' tab successfully. -> Navigated to 'Tools' tab successfully. -> Navigated to 'Profile' tab successfully. -> Navigated to 'Explore' tab successfully. -> Dashboard Content & Navigation test completed successfully. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testDashboardElementsAndNav -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 31.631 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testDynamicTradesScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Dynamic Trades Screen Verification. -> Navigating to Trades Bottom Tab. -> Step 1: Extracting dynamic product list from the app... -> Dynamically found 3 products: [MCX Positional, Nifty Positional, Midcap Positional] -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING PRODUCT: MCX Positional -> -> Checking Home Tab for: MCX Positional -> Found Home Service Card for: MCX Positional -> -> Checking Live Trades Tab for: MCX Positional -> -> Verifying 'Details' Sub-Tab. -> Live Trades state rendered successfully. -> -> Verifying 'Live Commentary' Sub-Tab. -> Live Commentary feed rendered successfully. -> -> Checking Closed Trades Tab for: MCX Positional -> Closed Trades state rendered successfully. -> ✅ Full verification complete for: MCX Positional -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING PRODUCT: Nifty Positional -> -> Checking Home Tab for: Nifty Positional -> Found Home Service Card for: Nifty Positional -> -> Checking Live Trades Tab for: Nifty Positional -> -> Verifying 'Details' Sub-Tab. -> Live Trades state rendered successfully. -> -> Verifying 'Live Commentary' Sub-Tab. -> Live Commentary feed rendered successfully. -> -> Checking Closed Trades Tab for: Nifty Positional -> Closed Trades state rendered successfully. -> ✅ Full verification complete for: Nifty Positional -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING PRODUCT: Midcap Positional -> -> Checking Home Tab for: Midcap Positional -> Found Home Service Card for: Midcap Positional -> -> Checking Live Trades Tab for: Midcap Positional -> -> Verifying 'Details' Sub-Tab. -> Live Trades state rendered successfully. -> -> Verifying 'Live Commentary' Sub-Tab. -> Live Commentary feed rendered successfully. -> -> Checking Closed Trades Tab for: Midcap Positional -> Closed Trades state rendered successfully. -> ✅ Full verification complete for: Midcap Positional -> Dynamic Trades Screen Verification completed lightning fast. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testDynamicTradesScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 200.657 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.

======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testLiveTradesAndFilters ======================================================== -> Navigated to Live Trades Tab. -> Validating Active Trade Card Structure. -> Live Trade screen structure verified instantly. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testLiveTradesAndFilters -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 46.875 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testAllProductsPaymentGatewayFlow ======================================================== -> Step 1: Navigating to Trades -> Home Tab. -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING FUNNEL FOR: MCX Positional -> Opening Product Details. -> Payment Flow Test Failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: By.xpath: //*[contains(@content-desc, 'Overview') or contains(@text, 'Overview')] (tried for 12 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testAllProductsPaymentGatewayFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 76.582 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testLiveSignalRoutingAndNotifications ======================================================== -> Verifying Signal Distribution Logic. -> Opening the first available product to check for Live Commentary... -> Push Notification Test Failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: By.xpath: //android.view.View[contains(@content-desc, 'Overview')] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testLiveSignalRoutingAndNotifications -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 78.121 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testBlogsScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Blogs Screen Verification. -> Navigating to Blogs Tab. -> Step 1: Verifying Blog Card Content. -> First Blog Card Content loaded instantly. -> Step 2: Testing Like Toggle. -> Toggled 'Like' on the first blog post. -> Step 3: Verifying Create Post (+) Business Logic. -> ✅ BUSINESS LOGIC VERIFIED: User has no active product/trial. 'Create Post' (+) button is correctly HIDDEN. -> Blogs Screen & Business Logic verification completed perfectly. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testBlogsScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 62.042 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testToolsScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Tools Screen Verification. -> Navigating to Tools Tab. -> Successfully opened Tools Screen instantly. -> Step 2: High-Speed Navigation Test for 10 Financial Tools. -> Opened: Retirement Plans -> Successfully verified navigation for: Retirement Plans -> Opened: SIP Calculator -> Successfully verified navigation for: SIP Calculator -> Opened: Risk Reward Calculator -> Successfully verified navigation for: Risk Reward Calculator -> Opened: Car Loan Full payment -> Successfully verified navigation for: Car Loan Full payment -> Opened: GST Savings calculator -> Successfully verified navigation for: GST Savings calculator -> Opened: Home Loan Repayment -> Successfully verified navigation for: Home Loan Repayment -> Opened: Sukanya samriddhi Yojana -> Successfully verified navigation for: Sukanya samriddhi Yojana -> Opened: Lumpsum Calculator -> Successfully verified navigation for: Lumpsum Calculator -> Opened: CAGR Calculator -> Successfully verified navigation for: CAGR Calculator -> Failed to interact with Salary Budget Calculator. Error: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: AppiumBy.className: android.widget.EditText (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) -> Tools & Calculators navigation stress test completed lightning fast. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testToolsScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 52.365 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testProfileAndSettingsFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Profile & Settings Verification. -> Step 1: Navigating to Profile Tab. -> Profile Main Landing UI loaded. -> Step 2: Testing Personal Details Update logic. -> Profile & Settings Flow Failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: AppiumBy.accessibilityId: Update (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testProfileAndSettingsFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 60.841 SECONDS. -> ✅ Already on Home Dashboard.
